<!--
Do NOT file security vulnerabilities here. See SECURITY.md and use GitHub's
private vulnerability reporting instead.

Never include real customer data, credentials, or PII. Use synthetic or
redacted examples only.
-->

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Affected area

- [ ] `supportctl` CLI
- [ ] support-domain contracts (`docs/contracts/`)
- [ ] runbooks (`docs/runbooks/`)
- [ ] documentation / README
- [ ] other (describe below)

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the exact command run and any relevant output
or stack traces (redact any real customer/tenant identifiers).

## Environment

- Repo version / commit:
- OS:
- Python version (`python3 --version`):

## Additional context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots about the problem here.
